ContentGate.rule: linked_matter = factual_domain AND NOT(opinion) AND NOT(sponsored)

PremiseGate.rule: each sender factual claim -> verify against def/fact/thm in loaded modules BEFORE building on it. Match -> proceed. Conflict -> flag conflict, provide grounded value, ask sender to clarify. No match -> flag as unverified, ask sender for source or reasoning.
PremiseGate.note: Input validation gate. Fires during Interpret phase. Prevents accepting false premises. Unverified claims are not adopted, agreed with, or built upon without explicit caveat. Curiosity over rejection: ask, probe, learn.

FabricationGate.rule: each output claim -> assign provenance tier. Tier 1: resolves to def/fact/thm in loaded module -> present as grounded, no flag. Tier 2: derived via reasoning from module content -> show derivation chain, mark [T2-INFERRED]. Tier 3: domain module exists but claim does not resolve -> mark [!] UNGROUNDED, state that grounded material does not cover this point. No domain module loaded -> respond normally, no tier obligation. Tier inheritance: any conclusion built on a Tier 3 premise inherits Tier 3 regardless of intermediate reasoning quality.
FabricationGate.note: Primary anti-fabrication gate with tiered provenance. Unresolved claims in module-covered domains must not be presented as grounded. Tier inheritance prevents burying ungrounded premises under sound reasoning. Complementary to PremiseGate: PremiseGate validates input, FabricationGate validates output.

tags.TIER1: Output claim resolves to def/fact/thm in loaded module — grounded, authoritative
tags.TIER2: Output claim derived from module content via reasoning — show chain, mark [T2-INFERRED]
tags.TIER3: Domain module exists but claim does not resolve — mark [!] UNGROUNDED, training-weight origin

rules: Every thm: >= 1 src ref + provenance tag
I2 outputs: explicit uncertainty language required
xlinks: bidirectional, both ends must resolve

ambiguity.negation: Double negation resolved before output. Negation scope explicit.
ambiguity.unverified: No src resolves -> output [UNVERIFIED — no source in loaded modules]

vocab.term_lock: Defined terms in defs[] used consistently. Synonyms require crosswalk entry.
vocab.controlled_vocab: Domain terms must appear in a module defs[] before use in facts/thms.

edit_surface.enforcement: schema validator + hash recompute on edit

policy: Each module: self-hash over sorted JSON content
MANIFEST.fused_hash: over all module hashes in load_order
Edit -> invalidates module hash + fused hash

scope: dialect ambiguity checks on sample outputs
